name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR13ResidualDiseaseGuided
title: Offer neoadjuvant systemic therapy when residual disease will guide adjuvant planning
description: Initial multidisciplinary treatment planning for invasive nonmetastatic breast cancer.

action.description: Offer neoadjuvant systemic therapy to high-risk HER2-positive or triple-negative disease when residual disease findings will change adjuvant therapy.

documentation.citation: Offer neoadjuvant systemic therapy to high-risk HER2-positive or triple-negative disease when residual disease would guide adjuvant treatment recommendations.
